slides.headline: Shifting from a product-centric to a customer-centric model requires fundamental operating changes

left.title: Current State: Product-Centric
bullets: Siloed P&Ls organized by product category
Success measured by units sold per SKU
Marketing spend allocated by brand budget

right.title: Future State: Customer-Centric
bullets: Integrated P&L organized by customer segment
Success measured by customer lifetime value
Marketing spend optimized by predicted ROAS
Unified customer data platform with real-time 360 view

slides.source: Operating model diagnostic; Bain customer-centricity benchmark database
